title: taraxacum abax
intro: Taraxacum abax, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Asia, but has been naturalized in many other parts of the world. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum abax include treating digestive issues, reducing blood pressure, and supporting the immune system, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin problems and liver issues. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum abax can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
